front.title: HMTFTP: HKDF-Derived TFTP with Optional AEAD Protection

abstract.t: HMTFTP is a lightweight UDP file transfer protocol derived from TFTP that adds TLV-based negotiation and an optional AEAD protection mode for DATA payloads. This document requests IANA actions: assignment of a service name and UDP port, and creation of registries for TLV Types, OpCodes, and Ciphersuites.
